title: ophrys fuciflora subsp. elatior
intro: Ophrys fuciflora subsp. elatior, also known as the Greater Early Spider Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys fuciflora subsp. elatior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds for use in treating various health conditions.
